summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 139: Dynamic Enquiry Forms Module, Dashboard Integration Alerts, and Admin Panel UI Rearrangements. All backend tests pass (9/9). All frontend flows verified: Forms CRUD, sidebar rearrangements, integration alerts, enquiry PDF button, product enquiry form dropdown, Base Currency position.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/forms returns empty list (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/forms with name + form_schema creates form (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/forms without name returns 422
Backend: Full cycle - Create → Update (name + form_schema) → Verify via GET → Delete
Backend: PUT /api/admin/forms/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/forms/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/admin/enquiries/nonexistent/pdf returns 404
Backend: GET /api/admin/enquiries/{id}/pdf without auth returns 401/403
Backend: forms router registered correctly in server.py
Frontend: System Config tab REMOVED from sidebar
Frontend: Taxes tab appears BELOW Organization Info in Settings section
Frontend: Email Templates tab appears under Settings section
Frontend: References tab appears under Settings section
Frontend: Forms tab appears under Settings section
Frontend: Forms tab navigates to FormsManagementTab (not old WebsiteFormsSection)
Frontend: Default Enquiry Form tile visible in FormsManagementTab
Frontend: Create Form button opens dialog with name input
Frontend: Creating form 'TEST_UI_Form_139' succeeds and appears in Custom Forms list
Frontend: Edit form button opens slide-over with FORM NAME input and FORM FIELDS
Frontend: Enquiry pricing type (Enquiry Only) shows ENQUIRY FORM dropdown with 'Default Form' option
Frontend: Enquiry detail dialog shows 'Download PDF' button
Frontend: Connect Services - Email alert (Red bg-red-50) visible when no active email provider
Frontend: Connect Services - Cloud Storage alert (Orange bg-orange-50) visible when no cloud storage
Frontend: Base Currency widget appears BELOW Store Name in Organization Info section
Frontend: Organization Info shows correct order: Store Name → Base Currency → Logo → Brand Colors
critical_code_review_comments: forms.py line 49: Form is stored in DB with key 'schema' (not 'form_schema') to avoid Pydantic model field name collision. The API returns 'schema' and the frontend CustomForm interface uses 'schema'. This is by design and intentional.

EnquiriesTab.tsx line 103: PDF download uses localStorage.getItem('token') for auth header. This works but depends on token being stored in localStorage (not httpOnly cookies). If auth is ever changed to httpOnly, this will break.

FormsManagementTab.tsx: The 'formSchema' state for new form creation is initialized to '[]' but not exposed in the Create dialog UI (only name is asked). This means new forms always start empty - forms fields are edited via the slide-over Edit button. This is correct per design.

The integration alerts (Payments/CRM/Accounting) correctly don't show in this environment because Stripe, Zoho CRM, and Zoho Books are VALIDATED. Only Email (not active) and Cloud Storage (not connected) alerts show. This is correct conditional logic.
seed_data_creation: Created test forms: TEST_UI_Form_139, TEST_EditMe_139, TEST_Project Brief Form (backend tests); these may need manual cleanup via Forms tab Delete button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: enter 'automate-accounts' as partner code, then admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. The forms module is fully working: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/forms, PDF endpoint at /api/admin/enquiries/{id}/pdf. Sidebar: Settings section has Organization Info → Taxes → Auth & Pages → Forms → Email Templates → References → Custom Domains. No System Config tab. Integration alerts are conditional: Email (red) shows when no active email provider, Cloud Storage (orange) shows when none connected, Payments/Accounting/CRM show when none validated. Currently Stripe, Zoho CRM, Zoho Books are VALIDATED so their alerts don't show. TEST_ forms may still be in the DB from this test run - delete them if they cause issues.
